name: Calypso Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 package Red Star active dry yeast
recipeInstructions:
Place ingredients into pan in the order suggested by the machine's manual.
Use the 'sweet bread' or regular bread cycle.
An interesting bread with flavors popular in the Caribbean: ginger, coffee and banana. This recipe was taken from the WELBILT/RED STAR RECIPE CLUB collection.
